query:
-- Drop existing function if it exists
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS get_daily_puzzle_leaderboard(date, integer);

-- Create the leaderboard function
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_daily_puzzle_leaderboard(
  target_date date DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  result_limit integer DEFAULT 50
)
RETURNS TABLE (
  rank            bigint,
  user_id         uuid,
  username        text,
  display_name    text,
  avatar_url      text,
  time_spent_secs integer,
  attempts_count  integer,
  hints_used      integer,
  completed_at    timestamptz,
  streak_days     integer,
  is_current_user boolean
)
LANGUAGE sql
STABLE
SECURITY DEFINER
AS $$
  SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        dpa.time_spent_secs  ASC NULLS LAST,
        dpa.attempts_count   ASC,
        dpa.hints_used       ASC,
        dpa.completed_at     ASC
    )                                     AS rank,
    dpa.user_id,
    COALESCE(pp.username, 'Anônimo')      AS username,
    COALESCE(pp.display_name, pp.username, 'Anônimo') AS display_name,
    pp.avatar_url,
    dpa.time_spent_secs,
    dpa.attempts_count,
    dpa.hints_used,
    dpa.completed_at,
    COALESCE(pp.streak_days, 0)           AS streak_days,
    (dpa.user_id = auth.uid())            AS is_current_user
  FROM daily_puzzle_attempts dpa
  LEFT JOIN profiles_public pp ON pp.user_id = dpa.user_id
  WHERE dpa.puzzle_date = target_date
    AND dpa.solved = true
  ORDER BY
    dpa.time_spent_secs  ASC NULLS LAST,
    dpa.attempts_count   ASC,
    dpa.hints_used       ASC,
    dpa.completed_at     ASC
  LIMIT result_limit;
$$;

-- Grant execute permissions
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION get_daily_puzzle_leaderboard(date, integer) TO authenticated;
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION get_daily_puzzle_leaderboard(date, integer) TO anon;

-- Add index for performance
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dpa_leaderboard
  ON daily_puzzle_attempts (puzzle_date, solved, time_spent_secs ASC NULLS LAST, attempts_count ASC)
  WHERE solved = true;
